title: Dottyhop
compiled_truth: Dottyhop is an external contact at [Napanet](companies/napanet). Over the corpus period (2000-10-13 to 2001-12-03), Dottyhop sent 9 and received 20 emails, totalling 29 interactions. Top correspondents: [Waynearm](people/waynearm-napanet) (7), [Thomas Patton](people/thomas-patton-doj) (7), [Sandison](people/sandison-napanet) (7), [Sriordan](people/sriordan-hscis) (7), [Sjohnson](people/sjohnson-morganlane) (7).
